title: Run Manifest
description: Atomic provenance record for a single execution run. Every completed run produces exactly one manifest conforming to this schema.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Must match the version of this schema file.

job_name.description: Name of the job that was executed. Must match a directory under src/jobs/.

start.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run began.

end.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run completed (or failed).

git_commit.description: Git commit hash (short or full) at which the run was executed.

git_ref.description: Git ref (e.g. refs/heads/main, refs/tags/v1.0.0) checked out for this run.

source_mode.description: How the source code was obtained for this run.

workspace_dirty.description: Whether the working directory had uncommitted changes at run time.

untracked_files_present.description: Whether untracked files were present in the working directory.

canonical_spec.description: Path to the canonical environment specification file (always the Dockerfile).

image_digest.description: Digest of the container image used for execution.

lockfile_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the dependency lockfile used in the build.

base_image.description: Base image reference including digest pin (e.g. python:3.12-slim@sha256:...).

resources.description: Optional. Hardware and runtime environment details. Useful for performance comparisons.

runner_label.description: GitHub Actions runner label or machine hostname.

cores_available.description: Total CPU cores available on the machine.

cores_used.description: CPU cores allocated to this run.

gpu.description: GPU information, or null if no GPU was used.

parameters.description: Job-specific input parameters. Schema is defined per job, not globally.

filename.description: Output filename relative to the run directory.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the output file.

outputs.description: List of output files produced by this run.

status_detail.description: Free-text diagnostic message for non-success statuses.

visibility.description: Visibility classification. Determines eligibility for the publication gate.

supersedes.description: If this run supersedes a previously published run, record the old run_id here.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes about this run.
